reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Dr. Aletaha and her team are amazing! They made me feel comfortable and explained everything thoroughly. My teeth have never looked better. The office is modern and clean, and the staff is incredibly friendly.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: I had a dental emergency and they got me in right away. Dr. Houshmand was gentle and professional. The pain relief was immediate, and they worked with my insurance to make it affordable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Meghan R.
reviews.text: Beautiful office and kind staff. I felt heard the entire time. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Finally found a dentist I actually look forward to visiting. The team here treats you like family. My Invisalign treatment has been going incredibly smoothly — Dr. Aletaha walks me through every step.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Brought my kids here for the first time and they actually LIKED the dentist! The hygienists are so patient and kind with children. We have found our family dental home.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Had a crown done here and the process was seamless. The digital impression technology means no messy molds. The crown fits perfectly and looks completely natural.

reviews.name: Jennifer P.
reviews.text: I have severe dental anxiety and had avoided the dentist for years. Dr. Houshmand's sedation option changed everything. I was completely relaxed and got all the work done in one visit. I actually cried with relief afterward.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Drove over from Addison and it was worth it. Quick appointment, no waiting, and they explained my treatment plan in plain English with no upselling. Refreshing to find an honest dental office.

reviews.name: Aisha N.
reviews.text: My veneers turned out absolutely stunning. Dr. Aletaha listened to exactly what I wanted and the result looks completely natural. I can't stop smiling in photos now.

reviews.name: Carlos R.
reviews.text: Todo el personal habla español y me hicieron sentir muy cómodo. Excelente atención y precios justos. Muy recomendado para toda la familia.

reviews.name: Linda H.
reviews.text: I don't have dental insurance so I joined their membership plan. It saved me hundreds on my cleaning and crown. So glad they offer this for people without coverage.

reviews.name: Thomas W.
reviews.text: Needed a root canal and was dreading it. Honestly, it was painless and faster than I expected. Dr. Houshmand checked in with me the whole time. Not scary at all.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: We moved to Carrollton last year and were looking for a dentist for the whole family. This practice is fantastic with both adults and kids. Bilingual staff was a huge plus for my parents.

reviews.name: Kevin D.
reviews.text: Got my dental implant here and the result is incredible. It feels and looks just like a real tooth. The whole team made a complex procedure feel routine and reassuring.

reviews.name: Rachel F.
reviews.text: Professional teeth whitening here gave me results I never got from store strips. Several shades brighter in one visit and zero sensitivity. Wonderful staff too.

reviews.name: Daniel O.
reviews.text: Chipped my front tooth the morning of a big meeting and they fixed it with bonding same day. You honestly cannot tell it was ever damaged. Lifesavers.

reviews.name: Emily C.
reviews.text: The front desk team is so warm and they actually verified my insurance benefits before treatment so there were no surprise bills. Transparency like this is rare.

reviews.name: Brandon M.
reviews.text: Came in from Farmers Branch for an emergency extraction. They saw me within the hour and the financing options made it stress-free. Cannot recommend them enough.

reviews.name: Sophia L.
reviews.text: My kids actually ask when their next dental visit is. The hygienists are gentle and make it fun. As a mom that means the world to me.

reviews.name: Gregory A.
reviews.text: Switched here after years with another office and the difference is night and day. Modern equipment, no pressure, and they remember you by name. Genuinely the best dental care in North Dallas.

reviews.name: Hannah B.
reviews.text: I started Invisalign here six months ago and my results are already amazing. Dr. Aletaha is meticulous and the check-ins are quick and easy. So happy I chose them.

reviews.name: Marcus J.
reviews.text: Deep cleaning for early gum disease and a thorough explanation of how to keep it from getting worse. No judgment about how long it had been. Just real, caring help.
